title: Snowglobe Event
description: The contract between perception/ and automation/. Freeze early; extend payload, not the envelope.

event_type.description: Semantic, open-ended event type slug named by the perception model (snake_case), e.g. spill, blocked_exit, missing_ppe, overcrowding. Not a fixed enum.

snapshot_url.description: Path or URL to the frame that triggered the event
